description.en: Rated/characterised regions: operating/survival/startup bands, MPPT window, conditional derates — the THING's own behaviour envelope.

Stable channel slug when one instrument exposes several ranges of the same quantity (high, low). Omit for a single channel. Named channel, not id — a slug naming the sub-channel, not an opaque record identifier.

Asymmetric FRACTIONAL lower bound as a MULTIPLIER of nominal (0.7 => 0.7×Un). Verbatim spec-sheet form (e.g. 0.7Un–1.2Un). Pairs with `upper_fraction`; use for asymmetric fractional bands the symmetric `tolerance` can't hold. Unit-free.

Asymmetric FRACTIONAL upper bound as a MULTIPLIER of nominal (1.2 => 1.2×Un). Verbatim spec-sheet form (e.g. 0.7Un–1.2Un). Pairs with `lower_fraction`; use for asymmetric fractional bands the symmetric `tolerance` can't hold. Unit-free.

Symmetric ABSOLUTE band around nominal, in the quantity's unit (1500 ± 200 => margin: 200, i.e. 1300-1700). The absolute counterpart to tolerance; use when the datasheet states a ± figure in real units. Mutually exclusive with explicit min/max in practice.
Inclusive high end of a closed interval, in the enclosing concept's unit.
VIM 4.26, the honest coarse accuracy figure (a channel that RESOLVES to 0.01 may only be ACCURATE to ±0.5). Optional datasheet extra; never derived from resolution.
Inclusive low end of a closed interval, in the enclosing concept's unit.

The intrinsic-region axis: a region of THIS quantity's own axis named by the archetype's operating-state property — an MPPT window (mppt, mppt_fullpower), a circuit operating point (mpp, open_circuit, short_circuit). Open, domain-specific slug. NOT for external drivers that merely gate validity (a run mode) — those are categorical conditions.
The rated/designated value, in the enclosing unit — a nameplate point the tolerated band sits around.

The rated-envelope axis: how far the quantity is rated/permitted to range. Closed, universal — shared by every archetype, so a consumer reasons about 'the operating interval' without archetype knowledge. Datasheet sense of a rating; operating is a rated region, not a limit (hence rating, not limit). The instrument side is `rating: measurable` (VIM 4.7 measuring interval) — the ONE list holds both a thing's own behaviour bands and a sensor's readable span, told apart by this axis.
Quantization step, in the measurement's unit — smallest distinguishable change (VIM 4.14). Omit when the datasheet doesn't state it; never fabricate.
Symmetric FRACTIONAL band around nominal (±5% => 0.05) — a fraction of nominal, unit-free. Use when the datasheet states a percentage.
Non-SI unit override of a published/stated value — stated only when the value isn't in its quantity kind's canonical SI/coherent unit (kW vs W, °C vs K). Omit ⇒ canonical SI unit.
description.pt: Unidade não-SI de um valor publicado/declarado — declarada apenas quando o valor não está na unidade SI canônica do seu tipo de grandeza. Omitir ⇒ unidade SI canônica.
